LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT JEFFREY LEVIN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: CONTINUED TO JULY 10, 2102 TO GIVE THE PLAINTIFF AN OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. PLAINTIFF MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF HIS OPPOSITION PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302 NO LATER THAN 4PM JULY 3, 2012 WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, OR THE DEMURRER WILL BE SUSTAINED. THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS. (302/HEK) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR # 5976

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT JEFFREY LEVIN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH FIFTEEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF HIS OPPOSITION PAPERS AS REQUIRED BY LOCAL RULE 2.6B AND THE TENTATIVE RULING ISSUED IN ADVANCE OF THE HEARING ON JULY 2, 2012. ORDER SIGNED WITH THE MOVING PAPERS. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT LEVIN, JEFF #78 SFPD JURY DEMANDED

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT JEFF LEVIN'S MOTION TO DISMISS ENTIRE ACTION AND FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT, NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Entire Action And For Entry Of Judgment; Memo Of P&A; Declaration
Off Calendar Nov-16-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. MARK D. LIPTON, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, TEL. NO. 554-4218 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT JEFF LEVIN'S Motion To Dismiss Entire Action And For Entry Of Judgment is Granted. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith ; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =302/EG

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-04-2012 Continued To Dec-12-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-02-2012 Continued To Oct-17-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-10-2012 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT JEFFREY LEVIN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Sustained with fifteen days leave to amend. Plaintiff failed to provide courtesy copies of his opposition papers as required by Local Rule 2.6B and the tentative ruling issued in advance of the hearing on July 2, 2012. ORDER SIGNED WITH THE MOVING PAPERS. Judge: Harold Kahn; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/HEK)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-02-2012 Continued To Jul-10-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT JEFFREY LEVIN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.
No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Continued to July 10, 2102 to give the plaintiff an opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Plaintiff must deliver courtesy copies of his opposition papers to department 302 no later than 4pm July 3, 2012 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, or the demurrer will be sustained. The court has courtesy copies of the moving papers. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-15-2012 Continued To Aug-15-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-27-2012 Continued To Jun-29-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-10-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT JEFF LEVIN's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Off calendar without prejudice to being re-filed. The moving party did not provide courtesy copies of the moving papers as required by Local Rule 2.6B. Nor did the opposing party provide courtesy copies of the opposition papers. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported
